form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.90) at Murray Bridge in a Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 9 lengths. Has two wins and four placings from 12 starts from the draw. Expected to go close.

form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 4th on April 15 over 300m at Murray Bridge Straight behind Red Said So beaten 0.8 lengths (17.01) in a Grade 5. Placed two back at this track. Capable of a strong show.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 0.8 lengths at this track over 342m (19.74) beating Tenacious Design in Grade 5 on April 6. Good win recently but others preferred.

form.formComment: Dominant winner to post a big 8 lengths victory in a Grade 6 last start at Gawler, recording a blistering 22.62 over the 400m journey. In form and must include in calculations at odds.

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (19.94) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 8 length second. Has performed well off the draw with a win and four places from seven starts. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.
